author: mwjeth
content: making sure everyone's seen the currently open Ethstaker 2026 survey [here](https://ethstaker.org/forms/staking-landscape-survey-2026). please share / amplify [this post](https://x.com/ethStaker/status/2046247110870237512) so we can get max responses. and be sure you've filled it out yourselves ofc 🙂
